entries.scenario: Login page redirects authenticated users to dashboard
entries.description: When an already-authenticated user navigates to /login, RequireAuth redirects them to /dashboard.
entries.expectedBehavior: User is redirected to /dashboard immediately without showing the login form.

entries.scenario: Login with invalid credentials returns server error
entries.description: User submits login form with wrong email/password. The API returns a 401. The error summary is shown with role='alert' and focus is moved to the error.
entries.expectedBehavior: Error message appears in a live region; focus moves to the error summary for screen reader announcement.

entries.scenario: Settings page shows loading spinner while fetching profile
entries.description: When useProfileQuery is loading, a full-page spinner with aria-label 'Loading settings' is shown.
entries.expectedBehavior: Spinner is rendered with role='status' and descriptive label.

entries.scenario: Settings page shows error display on profile fetch failure
entries.description: When useProfileQuery returns an error, an ErrorDisplay component with retry button is shown.
entries.expectedBehavior: ErrorDisplay renders with descriptive title and retry button; user can retry the failed request.

entries.scenario: Reset password page handles missing token parameter
entries.description: User navigates to /reset-password without a ?token= query parameter. The page shows 'Invalid reset link' instead of the password form.
entries.expectedBehavior: "Invalid reset link" heading is shown with a link back to the forgot-password page.

entries.scenario: Settings page toggles notification preferences
entries.description: Notification preferences are loaded and displayed as toggles with aria-describedby descriptions.
entries.expectedBehavior: All 5 toggles rendered with proper ARIA attributes; initial values from API response.

entries.scenario: Settings page shows broken avatar image fallback
entries.description: When the user's avatar URL points to a broken image, the onError handler hides the image and shows fallback initials.
entries.expectedBehavior: Image is hidden via display:none; initials fallback remains visible.

entries.scenario: Settings page save button stays disabled when form is unchanged
entries.description: Once profile data loads, if no fields are changed, the Save Changes button remains disabled.
entries.expectedBehavior: Button has disabled attribute set; no API call can be triggered.

entries.scenario: Settings page changes password with wrong current password
entries.description: User enters an incorrect current password when changing password. API returns 401.
entries.expectedBehavior: Error alert with message 'authentication required' is shown.

entries.scenario: Settings password form validates minimum length
entries.description: User enters a new password shorter than 8 characters.
entries.expectedBehavior: Inline validation error 'at least 8 characters' shown; form not submitted.

entries.scenario: Notification preferences loading spinner
entries.description: When notification preferences query is loading, an inline spinner is shown in the notification section.
entries.expectedBehavior: Spinner with role='status' and label 'Loading notification preferences' is rendered.

entries.scenario: Notification preferences error state with retry
entries.description: When notification preferences query fails, an inline ErrorDisplay with retry button is shown.
entries.expectedBehavior: Inline error display renders with retry button; profile section remains visible.

entries.scenario: Forgot password sends email successfully
entries.description: User submits forgot-password form and the API returns success.
entries.expectedBehavior: Form transitions to success state showing 'Check your email' message.

entries.scenario: Reset password succeeds and shows success page
entries.description: User submits reset-password form and the API returns success.
entries.expectedBehavior: Success page with 'password reset successful' heading and sign-in link is shown.

entries.scenario: Signup succeeds and navigates to dashboard
entries.description: User submits signup form and the API returns success.
entries.expectedBehavior: Navigation to /dashboard happens immediately.

entries.scenario: Auth API login returns error on server failure (500)
entries.description: useLogin mutation receives a 500 error from the server.
entries.expectedBehavior: Mutation returns error; error message is derived from the response.

entries.scenario: Auth API handles network failure during login
entries.description: useLogin mutation fails due to network unavailability.
entries.expectedBehavior: Mutation returns a network error; error message indicates offline status.

entries.scenario: Auth API handles validation errors (422) on signup
entries.description: useSignup mutation receives a 422 validation error from the API.
entries.expectedBehavior: Mutation returns validation error with details about which fields are invalid.

entries.scenario: User API handles profile query failure
entries.description: useProfileQuery returns error on server failure.
entries.expectedBehavior: Query returns isError=true with appropriate error object.

entries.scenario: Session check handles offline state
entries.description: useSession query fails due to network unavailability.
entries.expectedBehavior: Query returns error; Redux auth state remains unchanged (no sessionExpired dispatch).

entries.scenario: Dashboard shows loading skeleton initially
entries.description: When DashboardPage mounts, the useDashboard query is in loading state.
entries.expectedBehavior: DashboardSkeleton with role='status' and aria-label 'Dashboard is loading' is shown.

entries.scenario: Dashboard renders stat cards and activity on success
entries.description: When useDashboard returns data successfully, stat cards and recent activity list are rendered.
entries.expectedBehavior: Stat cards show correct values; activity list shows recent items.

entries.scenario: Dashboard renders error state on API failure
entries.description: When useDashboard returns error (e.g., 500), an ErrorDisplay is shown with retry button.
entries.expectedBehavior: ErrorDisplay with alert role, title, and retry button is rendered; page heading remains visible.

entries.scenario: Dashboard retry refetches data on success
entries.description: User clicks retry after an error; the second fetch succeeds.
entries.expectedBehavior: Data appears after retry; fetch is called exactly twice.

entries.scenario: Recent activity list shows empty state
entries.description: When there is no recent activity, the activity list shows a 'No recent activity' message.
entries.expectedBehavior: Empty message text is displayed instead of activity items.

entries.scenario: Dashboard skeleton renders correct ARIA attributes
entries.description: The DashboardSkeleton component has proper ARIA busy and label attributes.
entries.expectedBehavior: Aria-busy='true' and accessible label set; skeleton rows are aria-hidden.

entries.scenario: Dashboard error boundary catches render crashes
entries.description: A child component of DashboardPage throws during render; RootErrorBoundary catches the error.
entries.expectedBehavior: Error boundary fallback UI shows 'Something went wrong' with error message and 'Try again' button.

entries.scenario: Project list renders and allows navigation to detail
entries.description: ProjectListPage loads project data and user clicks to view a specific project.
entries.expectedBehavior: Project data renders in a table; clicking a project row navigates to detail page.

entries.scenario: Project list shows empty state when no projects match filters
entries.description: API returns an empty items array; ProjectListPage shows empty state component.
entries.expectedBehavior: EmptyState with heading 'No projects match these filters' and CTA button is displayed.

entries.scenario: Project list shows error display on fetch failure
entries.description: useProjectList returns error; ErrorDisplay replaces the table content.
entries.expectedBehavior: ErrorDisplay with title 'Failed to load projects' and retry button is shown.

entries.scenario: Project list retry refetches data
entries.description: User clicks retry after an error; second fetch succeeds.
entries.expectedBehavior: Data appears after retry; fetch called exactly twice.

entries.scenario: Project create submits and navigates to detail
entries.description: User fills in project form and submits; API returns success with project data.
entries.expectedBehavior: Navigation to the new project's detail page occurs; success toast is shown.

entries.scenario: Project create shows error display on API failure
entries.description: User submits project form; API returns a 500 error.
entries.expectedBehavior: ErrorDisplay with 'Failed to create project' message is shown above the form.

entries.scenario: Project edit loads current values and saves changes
entries.description: ProjectEditPage loads existing project data, user modifies fields, and submits.
entries.expectedBehavior: Form pre-populated with current values; save navigates to updated detail page.

entries.scenario: Project detail shows delete confirmation dialog
entries.description: User clicks delete on ProjectDetailPage; a confirm dialog appears before deletion proceeds.
entries.expectedBehavior: ConfirmDialog opens with role='alertdialog'; confirm triggers delete mutation.

entries.scenario: Project list handles invalid page query parameter
entries.description: User navigates to /projects?page=0 or /projects?page=abc or /projects?page=-1.
entries.expectedBehavior: parsePositiveInt returns 1 for non-positive or NaN values; API called with page=1.

entries.scenario: Project list search lacks debounce
entries.description: User types rapidly in the search input; each keystroke triggers updateParams and an API call.
entries.expectedBehavior: Currently no debounce; each keystroke triggers a fetch. Should debounce to avoid excessive API calls.

entries.scenario: Project detail fetches single project data
entries.description: ProjectDetailPage loads project by ID from the URL parameter.
entries.expectedBehavior: Loading skeleton shown while fetching; data rendered on success; error display on failure.

entries.scenario: Project form validates input via Zod schema
entries.description: User submits project form with empty required fields or values exceeding max length.
entries.expectedBehavior: Zod validation prevents submission; per-field inline errors shown.

entries.scenario: Project list page error boundary
entries.description: Child component of ProjectListPage throws during render; caught by RootErrorBoundary.
entries.expectedBehavior: Error boundary fallback with 'Something went wrong' heading and 'Try again' button.

entries.scenario: Project create page error boundary
entries.description: Child component of ProjectCreatePage throws during render; caught by RootErrorBoundary.
entries.expectedBehavior: Error boundary fallback with 'Something went wrong' heading and 'Try again' button.

entries.scenario: DataTable shows skeleton rows while loading
entries.description: DataTable receives isLoading=true and empty data array.
entries.expectedBehavior: 5 skeleton rows rendered with aria-hidden='true'; empty state not shown.

entries.scenario: DataTable shows empty state when no data after loading
entries.description: DataTable receives isLoading=false and empty data array; emptyState prop is provided.
entries.expectedBehavior: Empty state ReactNode rendered below the table header.

entries.scenario: DataTable row click with keyboard (Enter/Space)
entries.description: User focuses a table row with role='button' and presses Enter or Space.
entries.expectedBehavior: onRowClick is called with the item data; keyboard navigation works.

entries.scenario: Toast displays with role='alert' for error kind
entries.description: A toast with kind='error' is added.
entries.expectedBehavior: Toast uses role='alert' and aria-live='assertive' to announce errors immediately.

entries.scenario: Toast dismiss button removes notification
entries.description: User clicks the dismiss button on a toast.
entries.expectedBehavior: onDismiss is called with the toast id; toast is removed from the region.

entries.scenario: ConfirmDialog shows with alertdialog role
entries.description: ConfirmDialog is rendered with open=true.
entries.expectedBehavior: Dialog rendered via portal with role='alertdialog'; focus moved to cancel button.

entries.scenario: ConfirmDialog handles pending state during async operation
entries.description: User clicks confirm and isPending=true is set; buttons are disabled during the operation.
entries.expectedBehavior: Both buttons disabled; confirm button shows 'Processing...'; Escape and backdrop click blocked.

entries.scenario: ConfirmDialog supports danger variant styling
entries.description: ConfirmDialog is rendered with variant='danger'.
entries.expectedBehavior: Danger CSS class applied to confirm button for visual distinction.

entries.scenario: Pagination hides when only one page
entries.description: Pagination receives totalPages <= 1.
entries.expectedBehavior: Component returns null; no navigation rendered.

entries.scenario: Pagination disables Previous on first page / Next on last page
entries.description: Pagination receives currentPage=1 (first) or currentPage=totalPages (last).
entries.expectedBehavior: Previous button disabled on first page; Next button disabled on last page.

entries.scenario: ErrorDisplay handles network error message
entries.description: ErrorDisplay receives an ApiError with kind='network'.
entries.expectedBehavior: Message 'Offline. Check your connection.' is displayed.

entries.scenario: ErrorDisplay handles validation errors with field paths
entries.description: ErrorDisplay receives an ApiError with kind='validation' containing issues array.
entries.expectedBehavior: Each issue's path and message displayed in a joined string.

entries.scenario: EmptyState renders with action button
entries.description: EmptyState is provided with an action prop containing label and onClick.
entries.expectedBehavior: Button with given label is rendered; onClick fires when clicked.

entries.scenario: ErrorDisplay without retry omits button
entries.description: ErrorDisplay receives no onRetry prop.
entries.expectedBehavior: No retry button rendered; error message displayed alone.

entries.scenario: Skeleton presents as decorative with no label
entries.description: Skeleton component rendered without a label.
entries.expectedBehavior: role='presentation' and aria-hidden='true' set.

entries.scenario: Spinner shows with informative label
entries.description: Spinner rendered with a label prop.
entries.expectedBehavior: role='status' and aria-label set to the provided label.

entries.scenario: ToastRegion renders error toasts in assertive region
entries.description: Toast entries with kind='error' are added to the region.
entries.expectedBehavior: Error toasts rendered in separate region with aria-live='assertive' and role='alert'.

entries.scenario: ApiClient returns unauthorized error on 401
entries.description: API client receives a 401 response from any endpoint.
entries.expectedBehavior: Returns { ok: false, error: ApiError { kind: 'unauthorized', message: 'Authentication required.' } }

entries.scenario: ApiClient handles network timeout
entries.description: API request exceeds the configured timeout (default 15s).
entries.expectedBehavior: Returns { ok: false, error: ApiError { kind: 'timeout' } }

entries.scenario: ApiClient validates response against Zod schema
entries.description: API client receives a response that fails Zod schema validation.
entries.expectedBehavior: Returns { ok: false, error: ApiError { kind: 'validation' } } with validation issue details.

entries.scenario: API hook handles network error for dashboard stats
entries.description: useDashboardStats query fails due to network unavailability.
entries.expectedBehavior: Returns error state with ApiError kind='network' and message indicating offline.

entries.scenario: User settings API handles update failure
entries.description: useUpdateProfile mutation receives server error.
entries.expectedBehavior: Mutation returns error; error state can be displayed.

entries.scenario: AuthLayout renders correctly with heading and children
entries.description: AuthLayout renders a heading, subheading, and children content.
entries.expectedBehavior: All sections visible with proper CSS classes.

entries.scenario: SettingsPage shows error boundary on render crash
entries.description: Child component of SettingsPage throws during render; caught by RootErrorBoundary.
entries.expectedBehavior: Error boundary fallback with 'Something went wrong' and 'Try again' button.

entries.scenario: DashboardPage shows error boundary on render crash
entries.description: Child component of DashboardPage throws during render; caught by RootErrorBoundary.
entries.expectedBehavior: Error boundary fallback with 'Something went wrong' and 'Try again' button.

entries.scenario: DataTable sort toggles sort order
entries.description: User clicks a sortable column header to toggle sort order.
entries.expectedBehavior: onSort is called with the column key and the opposite order; aria-sort updates.

entries.scenario: ProjectApi normalizes out-of-bounds query params
entries.description: useProjects called with page=0, pageSize=999, or search with leading/trailing spaces.
entries.expectedBehavior: normalizeParams clamps page to min 1, pageSize to 1-100 range, trims search.

entries.scenario: Login redirect validates against open redirect vulnerability
entries.description: User lands on /login?next=//evil.com or /login?next=https://evil.com after redirect.
entries.expectedBehavior: isValidRedirect checks startsWith('/') and rejects URLs with '://' or leading '//'.
